CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_info (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "ready" BOOLEAN, "structureVersion" VARCHAR, "version" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure
INSERT INTO _content_info VALUES ('checksum_blog', false, 'D1nqOjw9cSJ92Hk2kh1TzwwAK0r722yUjtEHToUmqGI', 'v3.5.0--Dx1G8rgpBngMGJee98vP2Mt1XxeH1X1UppLzOr6gT1M', 'AwGJuURM8n51bT_yxbEkWkktcnqne2v6vxgjctIzHuQ'); -- meta
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS _content_blog; -- structure
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_blog (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "title" VARCHAR, "author" VARCHAR NULL, "body" TEXT, "canonical" VARCHAR NULL, "category" VARCHAR NULL, "date" VARCHAR NULL, "description" VARCHAR, "excerpt" VARCHAR NULL, "extension" VARCHAR, "lab" VARCHAR NULL, "meta" TEXT, "navigation" TEXT DEFAULT true, "noindex" BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, "ogDescription" VARCHAR NULL, "ogImage" VARCHAR NULL, "ogTitle" VARCHAR NULL, "path" VARCHAR, "readingTime" VARCHAR NULL, "seo" TEXT DEFAULT '{}', "seoDescription" VARCHAR NULL, "seoTitle" VARCHAR NULL, "slug" VARCHAR, "status" VARCHAR NULL, "stem" VARCHAR, "tags" TEXT DEFAULT '[]', "type" VARCHAR NULL, "updatedAt" VARCHAR NULL, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure

INSERT INTO _content_blog VALUES ('blog/blog/openclaw-friction.md', 'When Agents Promise Autonomy but Deliver Friction', 'Gribo Digital', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["p",{},"The first promise of software agents is relief. The second, more difficult promise, is judgment."],["p",{},"When an interface claims autonomy but asks the user to supervise every fragile step, the result is not collaboration. It is a new kind of clerical labor wearing a futuristic label."],["p",{},"Friction is rarely just a bug. It is a design argument made visible: a trace of where the system still needs a human to carry its uncertainty."],["h2",{"id":"notes"},"Notes"],["ul",{},["li",{},"Autonomy should reduce cognitive switching."],["li",{},"Approval flows need clear stakes."],["li",{},"A good agent explains uncertainty without making the user manage its anxiety."]]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"notes","depth":2,"text":"Notes"}]}}', 'https://gribo.digital/blog/openclaw-friction', 'Interface Criticism', '2026-05-01', 'A short editorial note on agents, autonomy, product friction, and the hidden labor that appears when automation is not yet judgment.', NULL, 'md', 'ai', '{}', 'true', false, 'A note on the residue left when agents promise relief but make users manage the system''s uncertainty.', '/og/openclaw-friction.png', 'When Agents Promise Autonomy but Deliver Friction', '/blog/openclaw-friction', '4 min read', '{"title":"When Agents Promise Autonomy but Deliver Friction","description":"A short editorial note on agents, autonomy, product friction, and the hidden labor that appears when automation is not yet judgment."}', 'A Gribo Digital note on autonomous agents, product friction, and the hidden labor that appears when automation still needs supervision.', 'When Agents Promise Autonomy but Deliver Friction | Gribo Digital', 'openclaw-friction', 'draft', 'blog/openclaw-friction', '["agents","autonomy","friction"]', 'blog', '2026-05-08', 'b_1IQn-yg4DqP_qeuak5KtMc5F8MOwMEwc742tJcyTU'); -- b_1IQn-yg4DqP_qeuak5KtMc5F8MOwMEwc742tJcyTU

UPDATE _content_info SET ready = true WHERE id = 'checksum_blog'; -- meta
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_info (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "ready" BOOLEAN, "structureVersion" VARCHAR, "version" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure
INSERT INTO _content_info VALUES ('checksum_projects', false, '1joIppyCmuFo62RcOAzNT7hJCumb1dxSy_R6tYl44KU', 'v3.5.0--8fqSLNwV9PkUvD7zGbApLROt0nOEf-pKA_QHPcU058A', 'sJpHjU4Wer2doWoQyOqL09WKdf4TyxWfBbS0CKD6IvQ'); -- meta
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS _content_projects; -- structure
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_projects (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "title" VARCHAR, "body" TEXT, "canonical" VARCHAR NULL, "date" VARCHAR NULL, "description" VARCHAR, "docsFolder" VARCHAR NULL, "docsPath" VARCHAR NULL, "docsPaths" TEXT DEFAULT '[]', "extension" VARCHAR, "lab" VARCHAR NULL, "meta" TEXT, "navigation" TEXT DEFAULT true, "noindex" BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, "ogDescription" VARCHAR NULL, "ogImage" VARCHAR NULL, "ogTitle" VARCHAR NULL, "path" VARCHAR, "relatedArticles" TEXT DEFAULT '[]', "relatedBlogSlugs" TEXT DEFAULT '[]', "relatedDocs" TEXT DEFAULT '[]', "relatedPosts" TEXT DEFAULT '[]', "seo" TEXT DEFAULT '{}', "seoDescription" VARCHAR NULL, "seoTitle" VARCHAR NULL, "slug" VARCHAR, "stack" TEXT DEFAULT '[]', "status" VARCHAR NULL, "stem" VARCHAR, "summary" VARCHAR NULL, "tags" TEXT DEFAULT '[]', "type" VARCHAR NULL, "updatedAt" VARCHAR NULL, "year" INT NULL, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure

Court lines, body position, timing, and tactical pressure become signals that can be extracted, reviewed, and eventually explained."],["h2",{"id":"current-shape"},"Current shape"],["p",{},"The project is represented here as a repository record and technical docs scaffold. UPDATE _content_info SET ready = true WHERE id = 'checksum_projects'; -- meta
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_info (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "ready" BOOLEAN, "structureVersion" VARCHAR, "version" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure
INSERT INTO _content_info VALUES ('checksum_docs', false, 'fletLM_fWcFCfR0fBo-nsvWiomWbRXWWKOwsO6sn56w', 'v3.5.0--bmhn4r2xDIwoP8RxZxIpHU8mtuRuHnMh91EWS9R3dB4', '1Purt8qNYG3WI8fEPWSAik2iNn3p51klwxgIPuwOk28'); -- meta
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS _content_docs; -- structure
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_docs (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "title" VARCHAR, "body" TEXT, "canonical" VARCHAR NULL, "date" VARCHAR NULL, "description" VARCHAR, "docsFolder" VARCHAR NULL, "extension" VARCHAR, "lab" VARCHAR NULL, "meta" TEXT, "navigation" TEXT DEFAULT true, "noindex" BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, "ogDescription" VARCHAR NULL, "ogImage" VARCHAR NULL, "ogTitle" VARCHAR NULL, "order" INT DEFAULT 0, "path" VARCHAR, "project" VARCHAR NULL, "projectSlug" VARCHAR NULL, "section" VARCHAR NULL, "seo" TEXT DEFAULT '{}', "seoDescription" VARCHAR NULL, "seoTitle" VARCHAR NULL, "slug" VARCHAR, "status" VARCHAR NULL, "stem" VARCHAR, "tags" TEXT DEFAULT '[]', "updatedAt" VARCHAR NULL, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure

UPDATE _content_info SET ready = true WHERE id = 'checksum_docs'; -- meta
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_info (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "ready" BOOLEAN, "structureVersion" VARCHAR, "version" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure
INSERT INTO _content_info VALUES ('checksum_labs', false, 'IA7318SIMAnuJVIwwKXY6-D649IlKXot3TzcLsBVdR8', 'v3.5.0--VWvAkOp_4kqF5bcNfOE9H0Wka9wlKvxhLz4sORA_iyE', 'dbBXautSkVTj61kWV4sLC6xJvxaFHZzLkY2_W5uxTjY'); -- meta
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS _content_labs; -- structure
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_labs (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "title" VARCHAR, "accent" VARCHAR, "body" TEXT, "canonical" VARCHAR NULL, "description" VARCHAR, "extension" VARCHAR, "featured" BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, "meta" TEXT, "navigation" TEXT DEFAULT true, "noindex" BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, "ogDescription" VARCHAR NULL, "ogImage" VARCHAR NULL, "ogTitle" VARCHAR NULL, "openQuestions" TEXT DEFAULT '[]', "order" INT, "path" VARCHAR, "relatedTags" TEXT DEFAULT '[]', "roadmap" TEXT DEFAULT '[]', "seo" TEXT DEFAULT '{}', "seoDescription" VARCHAR NULL, "seoTitle" VARCHAR NULL, "shortTitle" VARCHAR, "slug" VARCHAR, "status" VARCHAR, "stem" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_info (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "ready" BOOLEAN, "structureVersion" VARCHAR, "version" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure
